# Owner

# What is it about in this Modpack:
this mod pack is a bit difficult as there are some difficult bosses. Modpack has created an add-on mod that adds automation to virtually everything. Finally, this modpack includes the Delight mod with add-ons. And much more, but you'll have to check it out for yourself.

# This modpack offer:
### ・💻250+ mods

### ・🌋A lot of bioms

### ・🦖Many Creatures

### ・🦥long Explorations

### ・🏢50+ different structures
